description: Style NoteThe rising temperature has us all in a tizzy but this stylish pair of shoes is one reason why we love the summer! This season fantastical bursts of colour and bright metallic tones are SO in! catwalk comes up with warm weather footwear essentials that turn traditional fashion styles on its head. This beautifully crafted pair will transform your daily spring wear with a bold yet graceful edge. Heel: 2.5"Product DetailsBraided thong style straps with beadingSoft, brown footbed with a heel patchThick, tough heelTPU outsole with a plastic heel capMaterial and Care SyntheticWipe with a clean cloth to remove dustDo not store under sunlight
